'''Doro''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos Underground]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Born in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Doro was twenty-eight years old by [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. While on a mission with [[Alexandra Winger]], their cover was blown by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] and during their flight from the Empire, Doro was struck by a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt. The blast did not kill him, but the resulting fall cracked his head on a rock, killing him.
